tweet.text: RT @WhereImFrom: 🔒THE DENZEL WARD COLLECTION🔒 We are absolutely thrilled to announce our new @denzelward partnership! From his iconic nickn…

RT @Browns: gotta think twice before throwing toward @denzelward in single coverage 🗜️ https://t.co/lkKHXFckLp
RT @AmHeartOhio: Hey Cleveland! 🧡 🤎 We are thrilled to announce that @denzelward of the @browns is helping us build a #NationofLifesavers!…
